headings.text: Marantz Expands Its Premium Hifi Separates Offerings with Three New Releases

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingMarantz Expands Its Premium Hifi Separates Offerings with Three New ReleasesPosted on January 22, 2025Marantz Expands Its Premium Hifi Separates Offerings with Three New ReleasesMarantz has announced the release of three new products that further expand its selection in the premium range of hifi separates options. The new products include the MODEL 10 amplifier, the Marantz Horizon and Grand Horizon, and the MODEL M1 and M4 streaming amplifiers.‍‍The MODEL 10 is a new reference in amplifier design. Featuring a newly designed dual-mono symmetrical amplifier topology, it is the most powerful, highest performing Marantz amplifier ever. It is priced at $15,000.00.The Marantz Horizon is a new wireless streaming amplifier that delivers a superior listening experience via an intuitive user interface. It is priced at $3,500.00.The MODEL M1 is a new wireless streaming amplifier that is engineered with performance and versatility in mind. It is priced at $1,000.00.These three new products are a welcome addition to Marantz's lineup of high-end audio equipment. They are sure to be popular with audiophiles and music lovers alike.‍‍Here are some of the key features of the new products:MODEL 10:Newly designed dual-mono symmetrical amplifier topology250 Watts per channelAll-New Marantz SMPSFully balanced dual mono amplifiersPhono MM/MCCopper-plated chassis‍Marantz Horizon and Grand HorizonMarantz Rise™ AmplifierMarantz Radiance™ 360° Seamless FabricMarantz AuraControl™Marantz Mirage™ DSPHEOS® Built-inElegant, intuitive user interface‍MODEL M1 and M442.1 Channels100 Watts per ChannelHDMI eARCDolby Digital+HEOS Built-in‍Marantz is a well-known brand for its high-quality audio equipment. The company has been in business for over 70 years, and it is committed to providing its customers with the best possible products. The three new products announced today are a testament to Marantz's commitment to innovation and excellence.The new products are now available for purchase from authorized Marantz dealers, such as AVIR, Inc. in Palm Desert.I would also like to add that these three new products are an excellent complement to Marantz's recent 2024 releases. The company has been on a roll lately, and these new products are sure to continue to impress audiophiles and music lovers around the world.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
